sentences.text: The Miller replied, 'What a foolish boy you are!
I don't understand why we send you to school if you don't learn anything.'
He continued, 'If Hans came here and saw our warm fire, good supper, and big barrel of red wine, he might become jealous.
Jealousy is a terrible thing and can ruin a person’s character.
